strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of GISCollective showing entrepreneurial initiative and platform ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, research, or platforms shipped at scale
Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC with strategic advisory experience
Cloud expertise is limited (AWS CDK mention); no deep cloud platform architecture track record

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Director-level IC influence and strategic advisory scope

response.justification: The role requires Director-level IC scope with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and deep cloud fluency to advise strategic customers. The candidate meets the 15-year experience bar and shows entrepreneurial traits via GISCollective, plus nascent AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq, but there is no evidence of shipped AI platforms, research credentials, or strategic advisory at the scale this role demands. Cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK on a pricing team) rather than platform-level. Strong craftsman profile, but the AI-strategy and principal-IC bar is not met on the evidence presented.
